texto: I've never met a person I don't care what his condition in whom I could not see possibilities. I don't care how much a man may consider himself a failure I believe in him for he can change the thing that is wrong in his life anytime he is prepared and ready to do it. Whenever he develops the desire he can take away from his life the thing that is defeating it. The capacity for reformation and change lies within.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Preston Bradley sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I've never met a person I don't care what his condition in whom I could not see possibilities. I …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, change, thing, útil em momentos de mudanca e reflexao.

texto: Bravery and faith bring both material and spiritual rewards.
explicacao: Citação de Preston Bradley sobre temas ligados a fe. “Bravery and faith bring both material and spiritual rewards.” articula fe, coragem, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Bravery and faith bring both material and spiritual rewards.

texto: The world has a way of giving what is demanded of it. If you are frightened and look for failure and poverty you will get them no matter how hard you may try to succeed. Lack of faith in yourself in what life will do for you cuts you off from the good things of the world. Expect victory and you make victory. Nowhere is this truer than in business that is where bravery and faith bring both material and spiritual rewards.
explicacao: Citação de Preston Bradley sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The world has a way of giving what is demanded of it. If you are frightened and look for failure …” articula fe, positive, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
